suite.name: Test Complete User Journey

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Close Application Browser
Run Keyword If Test Failed
kw.msg: Keyword 'Run Keyword If Test Failed' can only be used in test teardown.
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if the test failed.
kw.status: Keyword 'Run Keyword If Test Failed' can only be used in test teardown.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.

kw.status: Keyword 'Run Keyword If Test Failed' can only be used in test teardown.

suite.status: Suite teardown failed: Keyword 'Run Keyword If Test Failed' can only be used in test teardown.
